title: Factorial Calculation
description: Write a function to calculate the factorial of a non-negative integer n. The factorial of n is the product of all positive integers less than or equal to n.
solution_approach: Use recursion (n * fact(n-1)) or a loop from 1 to n.

title: Check Palindrome String
description: Given a string, check if it is a palindrome (reads the same forwards and backwards). Print 'True' or 'False'. Ignoring case and non-alphanumeric characters is optional for this basic version.
solution_approach: Compare the string with its reverse (s == s[::-1]).

title: FizzBuzz
description: Given an integer n, print numbers from 1 to n. But for multiples of 3 print 'Fizz', for multiples of 5 print 'Buzz', and for multiples of both print 'FizzBuzz'. Output as a space-separated string.

test_cases.expected: 1 2 Fizz 4 Buzz Fizz 7 8 Fizz Buzz 11 Fizz 13 14 FizzBuzz

solution_approach: Loop from 1 to n, use if-elif-else for modulo checks.

title: Find Maximum Element
description: Given a list of numbers as a comma-separated string (e.g., '1, 5, 3, 9, 2'), find and print the maximum number.
solution_approach: Split string by comma, convert to integers, allow max() function or loop.

title: Count Vowels
description: Given a string, count and print the number of vowels (a, e, i, o, u) in it. Case insensitive.
solution_approach: Loop through string and check if char in 'aeiouAEIOU'.
